name: Account Access Removal
description: Detects mass disabling or deletion of user accounts to deny access
query:
// Detect mass account deletion or disabling
// Trigger on multiple user account modifications in short time
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(net\s+user.*\/delete|userdel|Disable-ADAccount|Remove-ADUser|passwd\s+-l|usermod\s+-L)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 3
within 120 seconds
